title: Lamb Of God Frontman Randy Blythe Claims He Saw a UFO in North Carolina

title: Amazing Photos Of Alien Craft By The International Space Station
description: 1-22-23 EARTH ORBIT It’s common for sky watchers to see UFOs pulsing from dull to bright in the night sky. These sequential photos taken by the live-feed video camera on the International Space Station provide a closer look of that pulsing. [...]

title: U.s. Military Ship Followed By Two Alien Craft
description: In October 2021, over the course of several days off the East Coast of the United States, U.S. Navy crew members on the USS Kearsarge reported being followed by two car-sized “balls of light.” On deck crew members reported that the two [...]
